action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AP=0.2136 with linear feature encoding. Val AP plateaued around 0.22. The model treats categorical atom/bond features (atomic number, chirality, etc.) as continuous integers via linear layers, which is fundamentally wrong. OGB SOTA models use categorical embeddings. Analysis: The biggest improvement opportunity is replacing linear feature encoding with proper categorical embeddings. This should significantly improve representation learning. Decision: Rewrite model.py with categorical embeddings (using offset-based efficient embedding lookup), train from scratch for 80 epochs, submit eval.
